context: Evaluates the system prompt management routes. Checks that the list, get, and update routes call the correct PostgresDB methods and handle missing prompt_type with a 404 response.

checklist.name: GET /api/prompts returns list
checklist.description: The list endpoint returns all prompts from the database; it calls get_system_prompt or an equivalent bulk query.

checklist.name: GET /api/prompts/{prompt_type} 200
checklist.description: The detail endpoint calls db.get_system_prompt(prompt_type) and returns the record when found.

checklist.name: GET /api/prompts/{prompt_type} 404
checklist.description: The detail endpoint returns HTTP 404 when get_system_prompt() returns None for the given prompt_type.

checklist.name: POST /api/prompts calls update
checklist.description: The update endpoint accepts a PromptUpdate body and calls db.update_system_prompt() with the provided prompt_type and content.

checklist.name: PromptUpdate model validation
checklist.description: POST /api/prompts rejects requests missing prompt_type or content with a 422 Unprocessable Entity response.
